name: Early-Stage Conservative
description: Stage 1 patient, 60 years old, low frailty. Long window, cautious risk tolerance.

name: Late-Stage Aggressive
description: Stage 4 patient, 55 years old, moderate frailty. Short escape window, accept higher risk.

name: No Human Trials
description: Standard mid-stage case where experimental treatments are not permitted.

name: Elderly High Frailty
description: Stage 2, age 78, high frailty. Conservative approach with tight risk budget.
